title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
